rationale: In the citing paper, Van Heerde et al. (2013) appears only as part of a grouped citation in the results discussion, where the authors state their advertising elasticity estimates are in line with prior FMCG studies. The citation functions as a benchmark/comparison reference rather than a source for the paper's conceptual framing, hypotheses, modeling choices, or identification strategy. There is no distinct discussion of business-cycle mechanisms or direct methodological borrowing from this specific paper.
